profile.major: Arts, Technology & the Business of Innovation
profile.belief: Notice something you've never noticed before and the whole practice has already been won.
profile.working_on: Room-sized resonance chamber teaching bodies how to listen when there's nowhere for sound to hide.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire to awaken deeper awareness in others, revealing the beauty of subtlety in sound and silence.
